title: NMI - server side mods only
description: This is a collection of over ✨150+✨ server side mods that enhance your gameplay with voice chat, factions, economy, seasons, dungeons, buildings, mobs and much more. 🌌
body:
## IMPORTANT
It is very important for me to know your opinion about my mod pack that you downloaded and use. So please join my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/tRq88Cd2X6) and share your wishes and suggestions. This will help me to understand how to make my mod pack better and more interesting.

I recommend downloading my [UCP (Universal Clientside Pack)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ucp) mod pack with only client side mods.

# New Mechanics and Improvements (NMI) Modpack
This modpack is a collection of over 150 mods that work only on the server side, meaning you don't need to download anything to join the fun. All you need is a vanilla Minecraft client and a compatible server. The modpack is designed to offer a rich and immersive experience for both casual and hardcore players, with a variety of features and improvements.

Some of the main features of the modpack are:

- **Voice Chat**: Communicate with your friends and enemies using the Simple Voice Chat and Voice Chat Interaction mods. You can also create and join groups with the Simple Voice Chat Enhanced Groups mod, and customize your voice settings with the Cloth Config API mod.
- **Factions**: Create and join factions with the Factions mod, and compete with other groups for resources, territory, and glory. You can also use the Regional Chat mod to chat with your faction members or nearby players, and the Styled Nicknames mod to add colors and prefixes to your name.
- **Economy**: Earn and spend diamonds with the Diamond Economy mod, and use them to buy and sell items at the Universal Shops mod. You can also use the Bottle Your Xp mod to store your experience in bottles, and the Anvil Restoration mod to repair your items with diamonds.
- **Hats**: Customize your appearance with the Server Hats mod, and choose from over 50 different hats to wear. You can also use the Armor Stand Editor mod to pose and display your armor stands, and the Toggle Item Frames mod to make your item frames invisible.
- **Seasons**: Experience the changing of seasons with the Fabric Seasons mod, and watch the world transform with different weather, foliage, and crops. You can also use the Fabric Seasons: Terralith Compat mod to make the seasons compatible with the Terralith mod, which adds over 70 new biomes to the world.
- **Dungeons and Structures**: Explore a variety of dungeons and structures with the mods from YUNG's series, such as YUNG's Better Dungeons, YUNG's Better Mineshafts, YUNG's Better Strongholds, and more. You can also find more dungeons and structures from other mods, such as When Dungeons Arise, Repurposed Structures, Dungeons and Taverns, and more.
- **Mobs**: Encounter new and challenging mobs with the mods from Ultris: Boss Expansion, More Mobs, Monsters in the Closet, and more. You can also tame and ride skeleton and zombie horses with the Skeleton Horse Spawn and Zombie Horse Spawn mods, and use the Followers Teleport Too mod to make your pets follow you through portals.
- **Quality of Life**: Enjoy many quality of life improvements with the mods such as Better Than Mending, Double Doors, Convenient mobGriefing, Replanting Crops, and more. You can also use the ServerCore mod to access many useful commands and features, such as /home, /back, /tpa, /warp, and more.

## IMPORTANT
More mods, data packs and configurations will be included in the future.
Please suggest your mod on our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/tRq88Cd2X6) if you wish for it to be added to the modpack.

## FAQ

<details>
<summary>List of mods</summary>

For an up-to-date list of mods, go to the [Versions](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nmi/versions) section and click on the name of the version you are interested in.

</details>
<details>
<summary>How to install</summary>

To install this modpack, you need to download modpack and extract it to your server folder. Then, run the `start.bat` file to launch the server. Make sure you have Java 16 or higher installed on your system. You can also use the launchers to install this modpack easily.

</details>
<details>
<summary>How to update</summary>

To update this modpack, you need to download the latest version and replace the `mods` and `config` folders in your server folder with the ones from the file. Make sure you backup your world before updating.

</details>
<details>
<summary>How to report issues</summary>

If you encounter any issues or bugs with this modpack, please report them on the [issue tracker](https://discord.gg/tRq88Cd2X6). Please include as much information as possible, such as the mod version, the server version, the error log, and the steps to reproduce the issue. You can join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/tRq88Cd2X6) to get help from other users and the modpack author.

</details>
<details>
<summary>How to support</summary>

If you enjoy this modpack and want to support its development, you can do so by:

- Follow on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/modpack/NMI)
- Sharing this modpack with your friends and other Minecraft players
- Suggesting new features or improvements on the [issue tracker](https://discord.gg/tRq88Cd2X6) or the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/tRq88Cd2X6)

Thank you for your support and feedback!

</details>
<details>
<summary>Modification/Usage of the Mod Pack</summary>
If you intend to use or make modifications to this mod pack, kindly give credit to the author and provide a link to this page.
</details>
